Price: Free (Working Student Seeking Small Loan Until Payday)
body: Hi, I’m a working student and I’m honestly in a tight spot right now. I recently had to pay for several school-related expenses, and on top of that, my cat got sick, so most of my budget went there. I’m just trying to get by until payday.   I’m looking for a small loan to help cover my transportation and food until the 20th, which is when I get paid. I fully intend to pay it back on that date.   I know this is a big ask, especially from a stranger online, but I just wanted to try and ask in case anyone is willing to help. Thank you for taking the time to read this.
